name: all_inputs
short_description: Get a list of all input ports in the current design
full_help:
all_inputs

Description: 
Get a list of all input ports in the current design

Syntax: 
all_inputs  [-quiet] [-verbose]

Returns: 
list of port objects

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
SDC, XDC

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
